level_signals: Expected to 'lead product development and execution within a startup-like environment'
Expected to independently define ambitious vision/roadmap and drive prioritization

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have successfully launched large consumer facing features driving meaningful outcomes at B2C companies
You start with the consumer problem and have held a high bar for consumer experience
You naturally gravitate towards using data to make strategic decisions
You have communicated complex concepts succinctly for broad audiences to drive decisions
You have driven roadmap and prioritization exercises and driven clear impact through your decisions
You thrive in a culture of high ownership, velocity, and throughput, and speak your mind regardless of level
You have a track record of scrappily developing clear perspectives in areas of ambiguity

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building anti-fraud or ML-driven products

scope.surface: Plaid's consumer-facing surfaces including Link (flagship product) and 0-1 consumer initiatives
scope.business_model: B2B2C — Plaid sells developer tools/APIs to companies who embed Plaid products (like Link) for end consumers
primary_metrics_inferred: Consumer conversion and activation via Link
core_responsibilities: Define an ambitious vision / roadmap, sign up for quarterly / half year goals, and partner with the cross-functional team to hit them
Drive prioritization and execution (build, measure, iterate)
Identify opportunities through consumer feedback and staying close to our data / dashboards
Partner with cross-functional team (design, research, data science, legal, and compliance) to do all of the above

compensation.equity_form: equity and/or commission dependent on position

green_flags: Plaid is a well-known, high-growth fintech company with strong brand recognition
Link is described as driving 'vast majority of Plaid's revenue' — high-impact product surface
Explicitly encourages candidates to apply even if experience doesn't fully match
0-1 consumer initiatives signal greenfield product opportunity
Equity mentioned as part of compensation package
red_flags: No compensation range disclosed despite JD mentioning pay factors
Location and remote eligibility not stated in JD body — headquarters is SF but work modality is unclear
No specific years of experience stated, making seniority bar harder to assess externally

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Product Manager' and scope of responsibilities)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (SF listed as HQ; role's specific location not explicitly stated)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Pay is based on factors such as... location')
ambiguities: Work location type is not stated in the JD body (remote, hybrid, or onsite). Plaid HQ is SF but no modality is specified for this role. Marked as 'unclear'.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD. Marked as 'unclear'.
JD lists offices in NY, DC, London, Amsterdam but does not specify which offices are eligible for this role.
